name: migration: every rule id from RUBRIC.yaml appears in some target file (no rule lost)
command:
mkdir -p rubric && for i in 1 2 3; do printf '  - id: g-r-%d
    name: r-%d
    description: x
    detector: x
    provenance: [{source: google-tsguide, class: published-standard, section_id: x, url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]
' "$i" "$i" >> /tmp/r.yaml; done && { echo "rules:"; cat /tmp/r.yaml; } > rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && rm /tmp/r.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD" --emit-tree "$PWD/tree" && for i in 1 2 3; do grep -rE "id: g-r-$i" tree/ >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL missing g-r-$i" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
